productDisplayName: Puma Women Essential Workout Black Track Pants
description: Composition Black track pants made of 92% cotton and 8% spandex, has a soft and broad elasticated waistband, contrast panel detail on the waist and embroidered brand logo on the left leg Fit Regular Wash care Gentle machine wash in cool water Do not bleach Tumble dry at low temperature Cool iron Do not dry clean A split second can mean the difference between winning and losing. To ensure you're always on the winning side, these track pants from puma are designed to give you that added advantage. Pair them with a round neck T-shirt and sneakers. Model statistics The product is a size M on a model of height 5'7" and waist 25"
